parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: $json.lead_id, first_name: $json.first_name, last_name: $json.last_name, phone: $json.phone, email: $json.email, source: 'website_form', vehicle_interest: $json.vehicle_interest, stage: 'new', intent_score: 'cold', sequence_step: 0, demo_mode: $json.demo_mode, opted_out: false, salesperson_alerted: false, sms_count: 0, autopilot_active: $json.autopilot_active, assigned_at: $json.assigned_at, rep_response_at: $json.rep_response_at, assigned_to: $json.assigned_to, company_id: $json.company_id }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: Array.isArray($json) ? $json[0].id : $json.id, company_id: $('Round Robin Assign').first().json.company_id, event_type: 'form_submitted', metadata: { source: 'website_form', first_name: $('Round Robin Assign').first().json.first_name, vehicle_interest: $('Round Robin Assign').first().json.vehicle_interest } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', max_tokens: 1024, system: $json.system_prompt, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.user_prompt }] }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ from: $env.RESEND_FROM_EMAIL || 'noreply@styleauto.ca', to: [$json.lead_email], subject: $json.subject, html: $json.html, text: $json.text }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: $json.lead_id, company_id: $json.company_id, event_type: 'ai_auto_reply_sent', resend_message_id: $json.resend_id, metadata: { channel: 'email', subject: $json.subject, email_sent: $json.email_sent, resend_id: $json.resend_id } }) }}
